scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npm run seed --prefix backend && BACKEND_PORT=2999 concurrently "npm run start:dev --prefix backend" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix frontend && npm run build --prefix backend
scripts.start: node backend/dist/seed/seed.js && npm run start:prod --prefix backend
